faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know
faq.q1: Does the platform fully support Arabic?
faq.a1: Yes, the platform is built natively for Arabic: fonts, RTL direction, and design — everything is optimized.
faq.q2: Do I need technical knowledge to use the platform?
faq.a2: Not at all. The interface is designed to be very simple — in 3 steps you get your card.
faq.q3: What format are the generated images?
faq.a3: PNG at 1080×1080 (or the selected ratio) — ready to publish immediately.
faq.q4: Can I use my organization's logo?
faq.a4: Yes, you can upload your logo and set its position. In paid plans, it's automatically saved with each template.
faq.q5: How does the Telegram bot work?
faq.a5: You connect the bot to your account, send the article text with the image — the bot generates the card and sends it directly to your channel.
faq.q6: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a6: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time with no additional charges.

footer.desc: Arabic news card generator — broadcast quality in seconds.
